hero_title: Detect voice scams before you send money.
hero_desc: Upload audio, record a clip, or test a scam example. VoiceSafe returns a structured fraud risk score with explainable signals.
summary_default: VoiceSafe will summarize the detected risk after analysis.
result_warning: This result should be verified before taking financial action.
signal_3: Urgent language patterns common in scam calls
toast_example_error: Example audio could not be loaded.
heroDesc: Upload audio, record a clip, or test a scam example. VoiceSafe returns a structured fraud risk score with explainable signals.
heroMetaLine: ⚡ AI analysis takes ~5 seconds • 🔒 Voice is never stored
privateAnalysisNote: 🔒 Private analysis. Audio is processed instantly and not stored.
tryScamVoiceNote: ⚠ Try a simulated AI scam voice example
use_banks_desc: Support fraud review and suspicious-call triage.
use_investigators_desc: Review voice evidence faster with structured risk signals.
use_journalists_desc: Check suspicious audio before publishing or reporting.
use_businesses_desc: Reduce risk from fake executives, payment pressure and cloned voices.
technology_desc: VoiceSafe analyzes acoustic, behavioral and linguistic patterns in voice messages. The system detects signals commonly associated with fraud calls such as voice cloning, emotional pressure, urgency patterns and synthetic speech artifacts.
tech_card_1_desc: Identifies patterns typical for cloned or generated voices.
tech_card_2_desc: Detects urgency and emotional manipulation used in scams.
tech_card_3_desc: Produces explainable signals instead of a simple score.
footerStartDesc: Upload a suspicious voice message and receive an AI-generated risk assessment in seconds.
footerBottomLeft: Built with AI-driven risk analysis technology
scamAlertDesc: Do not send money. Verify caller identity through an official number.
